Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the scripting capabilities for developers, leading to more dynamic gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the current version of the game code as a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes in the game code for better version control and updates.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how dynamic strings with timestamps are processed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and performance of time-related string displays.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way string data is stored and retrieved in the system.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed of loading text elements in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are formatted and displayed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides quicker and more efficient display of time-related information in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagResetScriptZoomActionContext_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Resets the zoom level of scripts in the editor when a specific action occurs.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers maintain a consistent view while working on scripts.
